## Title: Fix type confusion in paramlist array handling

### Summary
Fix a type confusion bug in the configuration library where `paramlist_def_t.paramarray` was declared as `paramdef_t **` but used as a flat array of `paramdef_t` structures. The incorrect type declaration led to incompatible pointer casting and unnecessary double-pointer indirection. This change corrects the type to `paramdef_t *` and updates the allocation/access logic to use a single contiguous memory block, improving type s
